tip_watt_text: If you experience slow download speeds, we recommend using the free acceleration tool Watt Toolkit to improve your experience.
tip_repair_text: If you encounter missing or corrupted resource files, click the repair icon in the lower-right corner of the launcher loading screen. The program will exit and attempt to repair on the next startup.
alert_windows_missing: Windows download link not configured. Please contact the administrator.
alert_android_missing: Android download link not configured. Please contact the administrator.
alert_repair_click: Click the repair icon in the lower-right corner of the launcher loading screen. The program will exit and auto-repair.
no_download_options: No download links available for this platform. Please contact the administrator.
